title: S3 Orchestrator Composer - evidence (8 criteria)
note: beats ac1-ac7 recorded at desktop viewport 1280x2960; ac8 recorded at iPhone viewport 390x844 and letterboxed into the shared 1280x2960 canvas (viewport-emulated).

beats.caption: AC-1 - four surfaces: tray, 18x3 matrix, rails, try-it
beats.expectedScreen: the full Orchestrator Composer top-to-bottom: a TARGETS tray of cards each with an effort dial, an 18-row MATRIX with T0-trivial / T1-standard / T2-deep columns, four WORK-KIND RAILS, and a TRY IT strip - all four surfaces visible

beats.caption: AC-2 - drag set implement x T2-deep to cc-sonnet-med
beats.expectedScreen: the matrix implement row, T2-deep (rightmost) column cell highlighted with a yellow box, reading a Claude Code 'sonnet' token with effort 'medium' (the cc-sonnet-med target dropped onto it)

beats.caption: AC-3 - the drop recompiled policy.json (model sonnet)
beats.expectedScreen: a JSON panel of policy.json's implement T2-deep entry, the "model": "sonnet" line highlighted, alongside "targetId": "cc-sonnet-med"

beats.caption: AC-4 - effort dial retuned cc-haiku-low to medium
beats.expectedScreen: the cc-haiku-low target card in the tray with its effort dial's 'medium' segment now the active (accent) segment, highlighted with a yellow box

beats.caption: AC-5 - toggled test off in api-change (dimmed, still shown)
beats.expectedScreen: the api-change work-kind rail with its 'test' phase chip now dimmed (off) but still present in the rail next to the other chips - off, never hidden

beats.caption: AC-6 - dry-run resolved the full rail
beats.expectedScreen: the try-it output: kind/tier/type pills (kind: full-feature, tier: T1-standard, type: implement) above a resolved rail of phase chips, each chip showing a skill name and a model/effort target

beats.caption: AC-7 - Improver proposals: nothing auto-applies
beats.expectedScreen: the Improver proposals panel highlighted at the top of the composer, showing one policy-edit proposal (the test gate failed in 2/3 full-feature runs) with Accept and Dismiss buttons - review before applying

beats.caption: AC-8 - iPhone 390x844: matrix scrolls in its own container
beats.expectedScreen: the composer at iPhone width (390px): a single-column layout with the topbar and profile buttons wrapped, and the 18-row matrix inside its own container whose T1-standard / T2-deep columns are cut off at the container's right edge (it scrolls horizontally on its own), with no page-level horizontal overflow
